basic_details.job_title: NFSU Dharwad Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Forensic Sciences University Dharwad (NFSU Dharwad)
basic_details.short_information: National Forensic Sciences University Dharwad (NFSU Dharwad) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. NFSU/DHARWAD/ADM/REC/CF/2026-27/1 on the official website https://www.nfsu.ac.in. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the NFSU Dharwad Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in relevant discipline, Master's degree with 60% or equivalent, UGC/CSIR NET (where applicable)
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Forensic Science): Ph.D. in relevant discipline. First class or 60% or equivalent in M.Sc. in Forensic Sciences or equivalent with specialization in Forensic Biology/General Forensics/Biotechnology/Genetics/Molecular Biology/Toxicology/Analytical Toxicology/Analytical Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Chemistry & Toxicology from a recognized university. Additional desirable: minimum of two publications in renowned journals of repute. Assistant Professor (Computer Science/Information Technology/Cyber Security): Ph.D. in relevant discipline. First class or 60% or equivalent in M.E./M.Tech. with specialization in Computer Science & Engineering/Cyber Security/Information Security/Network Technology/Information Technology/Blockchain/Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence/Data Science from a recognized university. Additional desirable: minimum of two publications in renowned journals of repute; Certification in ethical hacking or Cyber Security. Assistant Professor (Pharmacology): Ph.D. in relevant discipline. First class or 60% or equivalent in Master's Degree in Pharmacy/Forensic Pharmacy with specialization in Pharmacology from a recognized university. Registration as Pharmacist under Pharmacy Act is mandatory. Additional desirable: minimum of two publications in renowned journals of repute.

selection_process: Screening of applications Screening Test (if number of applications high) Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NFSU Dharwad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NFSU Dharwad Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.national_forensic_sciences_university_dh: Ph.D. in relevant discipline, Master's degree with 60% or equivalent, UGC/CSIR NET (where applicable)

content_sections.heading: NFSU Dharwad Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NFSU Dharwad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NFSU Dharwad Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NFSU Dharwad Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor (Forensic Science): Ph.D. in relevant discipline. First class or 60% or equivalent in M.Sc. in Forensic Sciences or equivalent with specialization in Forensic Biology/General Forensics/Biotechnology/Genetics/Molecular Biology/Toxicology/Analytical Toxicology/Analytical Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Chemistry & Toxicology from a recognized university. Additional desirable: minimum of two publications in renowned journals of repute. Assistant Professor (Computer Science/Information Technology/Cyber Security): Ph.D. in relevant discipline. First class or 60% or equivalent in M.E./M.Tech. with specialization in Computer Science & Engineering/Cyber Security/Information Security/Network Technology/Information Technology/Blockchain/Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence/Data Science from a recognized university. Additional desirable: minimum of two publications in renowned journals of repute; Certification in ethical hacking or Cyber Security. Assistant Professor (Pharmacology): Ph.D. in relevant discipline. First class or 60% or equivalent in Master's Degree in Pharmacy/Forensic Pharmacy with specialization in Pharmacology from a recognized university. Registration as Pharmacist under Pharmacy Act is mandatory. Additional desirable: minimum of two publications in renowned journals of repute.

content_sections.heading: NFSU Dharwad Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

rows.event: Date of Commencement of Online Application

content_sections.heading: NFSU Dharwad Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Screening of applications Screening Test (if number of applications high) Personal Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NFSU Dharwad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NFSU Dharwad Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NFSU Dharwad Assistant Professor recruitment is 09 July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by NFSU Dharwad?
faq.answer: NFSU Dharwad has announced a total of 6 vacancies for the Assistant Professor position across various disciplines. This includes positions in Forensic Science, Computer Science/IT/Cyber Security, and Pharmacology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in the relevant discipline and a Master's degree with at least 60% marks or equivalent. UGC/CSIR NET qualification is also required where applicable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Assistant Professor posts is 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the government's recruitment rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the NFSU Dharwad recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 250/- for SC/ST candidates. PwBD and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Professor posts will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 75,000/- to Rs. 90,000/- per month, depending on the specific post and experience.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the Assistant Professor roles?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the screening of applications, followed by a screening test if the number of applications is high. Candidates shortlisted will then proceed to a personal interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for these Assistant Professor positions at NFSU Dharwad is contractual. Candidates should be aware of this employment term before applying.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section on this page. It is highly recommended to read the PDF thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of NFSU Dharwad for career-related information?
faq.answer: The official website for career-related information and updates from the National Forensic Sciences University Dharwad is https://nfsu.ac.in/career. You can visit this site for more details.
